label: Studio MySQL POC lifecycle fuzz lab workload

metadata.local_execution_policy: static-validation-only; do not run destructive runner locally

classification_contract.unsupported_platform: Provider/platform unavailable or explicitly unsupported; expected unsupported probes are reported as skipped coverage, not product failures.
classification_contract.product_bug: The Studio MySQL path accepted the scenario but violated an invariant or returned an unexpected failure.
classification_contract.rig_setup_failure: The lab/component setup failed before the product invariant could be evaluated, such as npm/build, timeout, or lock setup failure.
classification_contract.rig_induced_fault: The workload intentionally injected a negative condition, such as port collision or synthetic hash mismatch, to verify diagnostics.
classification_contract.product_guardrail: The product intentionally rejected a risky operation and preserved state.

post_case_diagnostics.policy: Health probes run after selected cases and are recorded separately from the primary result so they do not mask the primary failure/success.
post_case_diagnostics.probe: wp db query SELECT 1 against the case site when a managed MySQL site should remain usable

build-cli: Studio CLI bundle exists before destructive MySQL cases run
NPM install/build failures classify as rig setup failures
create-mysql-native: Site config includes managed MySQL metadata
create-mysql-playground-rejected: Rejected creation does not leave a usable site config entry
create-sqlite-default: MySQL support does not change omitted database-engine behavior
convert-sqlite-empty: Default SQLite content converts to MySQL
Converted site remains addressable by Studio CLI
convert-sqlite-large: Published post/page counts and sentinel checksum match after conversion
convert-sqlite-rollback-on-kept-dropin: Failed conversion rolls back to SQLite
Partial MySQL config is not persisted
mysql.start.stop.restart: Managed MySQL starts and stops cleanly
WP-CLI can query the database after start
Stop cleanup is recorded without masking earlier results
mysql.port.collision: Port collision produces a controlled failure
mysql.orphan.process.recovery: Recovery stop leaves the site manageable
mysql.concurrent.install.lock: Concurrent site creation shares the binary install lock safely
Lock contention is classified separately from data-loss failures
wpcli.db.query: WP-CLI db query succeeds against managed MySQL
SELECT 1 returns through the Studio runtime
wpcli.db.import.export: Import restores deleted sentinel option exactly
wpcli.starts.mysql.when-needed: WP-CLI starts managed MySQL on demand
Database query succeeds without manually starting the site
binary.hash.mismatch: Synthetic hash mismatch includes expected and actual SHA-256
No network download or product mutation is required
binary.offline.unsupported-platform: Synthetic unsupported platform is reported as skipped coverage
Missing provider artifact is not counted as a product failure

readiness.coverage_contract: Studio MySQL POC fuzzing is declared as a lab-only isolated mutation workload. The checked-in runner creates fresh temp Studio config/runtime roots, but reviewer-facing lab artifacts are required before this workload can be marked proven.
upstream_blockers: Run through an approved destructive lab/offload environment and attach reviewer-facing Homeboy fuzz result artifacts.
